allow: Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const names = [''SiC'',''SiCplusplus'',''SiCsharp'',''SiJava'',''SiPython'',''SiJavascript'',''SiTypescript'',''SiHtml5'',''SiCss3'',''SiMysql'',''SiReact'',''SiAngular'',''SiNextdotjs'',''SiTailwindcss'',''SiFlask'',''SiDjango'',''SiNodedotjs'',''SiExpress'',''SiGit'',''SiFirebase'',''SiSupabase'',''SiAmazonwebservices'',''SiDocker'']; names.forEach\(n => console.log\(n, si[n] ? ''OK'' : ''MISSING''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); const matches = keys.filter\(k => /csharp|java|css3|amazon|aws/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(matches.slice\(0,30\).join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /^SiJ/.test\(k\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => /^SiC/.test\(k\) && k.length < 12\).join\(''\\n''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(''CSS:'', keys.filter\(k => /css/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,5\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''AWS/Amazon:'', keys.filter\(k => /amazon|aws/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,10\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''Dotnet/CSharp:'', keys.filter\(k => /dotnet|csharp|sharp|micro|msn/i.test\(k\)\).slice\(0,10\).join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const di = require\(''react-icons/di''\); const keys = Object.keys\(di\); console.log\(''Di keys sample:'', keys.filter\(k => /java|css|csharp|dotnet|aws/i.test\(k\)\).join\('', ''\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(''Css options:'', keys.filter\(k => /^SiCss/.test\(k\)\).join\('', ''\)\); console.log\(''SiSharp:'', si.SiSharp ? ''OK'' : ''N/A''\); console.log\(''SiDotnet:'', si.SiDotnet ? ''OK'' : ''N/A''\);")

Bash(node -e "const di = require\(''react-icons/di''\); const fa = require\(''react-icons/fa''\); console.log\(''di.DiJava:'', di.DiJava ? ''OK'' : ''missing''\); console.log\(''di.DiCss3:'', di.DiCss3 ? ''OK'' : ''missing''\); console.log\(''fa.FaAws:'', fa.FaAws ? ''OK'' : ''missing''\); const bs = require\(''react-icons/bs''\); keys = Object.keys\(bs\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''sharp''\)\); console.log\(''bs sharp:'', keys.slice\(0,5\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\(''react-icons/si''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); keys.filter\(k => k.includes\(''C''\) || k.includes\(''c#''\) || k.includes\(''Cs''\)\).filter\(k => k.length < 12\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const di = require\(''react-icons/di''\); const keys = Object.keys\(di\); keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''c#''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''csharp''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''java''\)\).forEach\(k => console.log\(k\)\);")
